description: Explore current ledger/audit storage, schemas, APIs, SSE watchers, and tests to plan migration to .fabric/events.jsonl.
focus: LEDGER_PATH AUDIT_LOG_FILE read-ledger audit-log ledger schemas /api/ledger /api/events watcher history replay
result_json: {"id":"E1","status":"completed","findings":"Current storage is dual JSONL: .fabric/.intent-ledger.jsonl (+ legacy root fallback) for LedgerEntry and .fabric/audit.jsonl for get_rules/edit_intent/rule_selection. HTTP MCP EventStore also stores kind=mcp-event lines in the ledger file. /api/ledger and history replay consume readLedger; /events watches ledger/meta/lock/forensic files and projects ledger:appended with ring-buffer replay, but ignores audit.jsonl. Migration needs .fabric/events.jsonl plus compatibility projections for ledger views, audit compliance windows, MCP replay, and SSE semantics.","key_files":["packages/server/src/services/_shared.ts","packages/server/src/services/read-ledger.ts","packages/server/src/services/audit-log.ts","packages/server/src/http.ts","packages/server/src/api/ledger.ts","packages/server/src/api/events.ts","packages/server/src/services/rehydrate-state.ts","packages/shared/src/schemas/ledger-entry.ts","packages/shared/src/schemas/events.ts","packages/server/src/services/read-ledger.test.ts","packages/server/src/services/audit-log.test.ts","packages/cli/__tests__/ledger-append.test.ts","packages/dashboard/src/hooks/use-events.ts","packages/dashboard/src/views/intent-timeline.tsx","packages/dashboard/src/views/history-replay.tsx"],"error":""}

description: Explore Fabric server MCP tools/services to identify where typed events should be recorded automatically, replacing explicit fab_append_intent.
focus: registerTool plan-context rule-sections append-intent tool lifecycle recordEvent typed events MCP services
result_json: {"id":"E2","status":"completed","findings":"MCP registration is split across packages/server/src/tools/* and directly calls services. Existing writes are service-local: getRules appends get_rules audit, getRuleSections appends rule_selection, appendIntent writes ledger then edit_intent audit; planContext is readOnlyHint true but has no event write, and destructive updateRegistry has none. Implement shared recordEvent for .fabric/events.jsonl and instrument plan_context_requested, rule_sections_selected, intent_recorded/edit_intent_checked, registry_updated/deprecated with correlation_id/session_id propagation. Tests impacted: audit-log, rule-sections, append-intent/read-ledger, update-registry, index/tool registration.","key_files":["packages/server/src/index.ts","packages/server/src/tools/plan-context.ts","packages/server/src/tools/rule-sections.ts","packages/server/src/tools/append-intent.ts","packages/server/src/tools/update-registry.ts","packages/server/src/services/audit-log.ts","packages/server/src/services/get-rules.ts","packages/server/src/services/plan-context.ts","packages/server/src/services/rule-sections.ts","packages/server/src/services/append-intent.ts","packages/server/src/services/update-registry.ts","packages/server/src/services/audit-log.test.ts","packages/server/src/services/rule-sections.test.ts","packages/server/src/services/update-registry.test.ts"],"error":""}

description: Explore doctor, sync-meta, agents meta hash flow, and rule text source-of-truth path for baseline sync and drift acceptance.
focus: doctor sync-meta agents.meta hash drift baseline rule text source of truth doctor fix
result_json: {"id":"E3","status":"completed","findings":"sync-meta is the rule-text compiler: reads .fabric/bootstrap/README.md plus .fabric/agents/**/*.md, computes node hash/stable_id/identity_source and revision, and --check-only detects computed-vs-existing drift. doctor recomputes hashes/revision from agents.meta.json and reports stale meta/missing files/derived identities, but does not accept baseline or write ledger; doctor --fix only migrates legacy ledger. Event Ledger should record rule_drift_detected on explicit doctor audit/fix paths and rule_baseline_accepted when sync-meta updates meta; normal doctor reads should stay non-mutating. Deprecating fab_update_registry requires template/docs/pre-commit text updates.","key_files":["packages/cli/src/commands/sync-meta.ts","packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts","packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts","packages/cli/src/commands/pre-commit.ts","packages/cli/__tests__/sync-meta.test.ts","packages/server/src/services/doctor.test.ts","templates/bootstrap/codex-AGENTS-header.md","packages/cli/templates/husky/pre-commit"],"error":""}

description: Explore CLI templates, protected tokens, tests, bootstrap docs, and command exports affected by explicitly deprecating fab_append_intent and fab_update_registry.
focus: fab_append_intent fab_update_registry protected tokens bootstrap templates CLI command tests docs deprecation
result_json: {"id":"E4","status":"completed","findings":"fab_append_intent/fab_update_registry are hard-coded as core protocol in server tool registration, protected-token lint, canonical bootstrap templates, installed bootstrap headers, docs, and hook warnings. Deprecation should keep/alias old MCP tools only for compatibility, remove them from bootstrap required-token policy, rewrite templates toward fab_plan_context+fab_get_rule_sections, sync-meta/doctor baseline acceptance, and typed events.jsonl.
